subcodes.first_line: O Ramadan! The proof hath indeed come, yet most among the people comprehend not. Say: Unto Thee, O my God, inasmuch as Thou hast guided me unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رمضان قد اتی البرهان و القوم اکثرهم لا یفقهون قل لک یا الهی بما هدیتنی الی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @thankfulness; gratitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
